proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +41.1pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Regime just flipped to Bear (1 day, shifting) — cohort is now activating after long dormancy; monitor for early signal-quality drift as live Bear trades accumulate
UP_TRI already dominates open book (82 of 91 positions); even TAKE_SMALL boost on Bear-regime UP_TRI signals could deepen single-signal concentration
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +41.1pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +41.1pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Regime has just shifted to Bear (day 1), so the cohort is now active — however TAKE_SMALL sizing limits incremental exposure, and current portfolio is still dominated by Choppy (85.71%) rather than Bear, so promotion does not compound the flagged concentration. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-13) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type×regime×sector + by_signal_type = Choppy regime (85.71%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (21.98%); UP_TRI signal (90.1%) (85.7%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type×regime×sector + by_signal_type = Choppy regime (85.71%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (21.98%); UP_TRI signal (90.1%); recommended action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI and sector=Bank until Bank exposure drops below 15 positions via natural Day 6 exits; redirect any new adds toward DOWN_TRI candidates or non-Bank sectors to reduce directional and sector concentration.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would simultaneously invalidate ~78 Choppy positions (all without validated edge) and the long-heavy 96.7% book would unwind together, with Bank cluster (21 positions, 23% of book) amplifying the drawdown through correlated sector beta.

evidence: UP_TRI dominates signal mix at 82/91 = 90.1% (>0.85 threshold)
Book overwhelmingly directional long: UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY + UP_TRI_SA = 88/91 = 96.7%
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort only at Candidate tier (n=188) — unvalidated edge
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.concentration_value: Choppy regime (85.71%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (21.98%); UP_TRI signal (90.1%)
decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI and sector=Bank until Bank exposure drops below 15 positions via natural Day 6 exits; redirect any new adds toward DOWN_TRI candidates or non-Bank sectors to reduce directional and sector concentration.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would simultaneously invalidate ~78 Choppy positions (all without validated edge) and the long-heavy 96.7% book would unwind together, with Bank cluster (21 positions, 23% of book) amplifying the drawdown through correlated sector beta.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Regime concentration triggered at 0.8571 (Choppy, above 0.80 threshold) AND UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell breaches the 0.20 cell threshold at 21.98%. UP_TRI also dominates signal mix at 82/91 = 90.1% (above 0.85 threshold) with the book overwhelmingly directional long (UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY + UP_TRI_SA = 88/91 = 96.7%). The matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=188) — unvalidated edge across the concentrated cell.

proposals.title: Regime shift: Choppy → Bear

claim.expected_effect: If next 2-3 trading days revert to Choppy, this is a single-day wobble; sustained Bear classification or recent_distribution flipping to Bear-majority within 5 days would confirm a full regime shift.

evidence: Current regime classification flipped to Bear (days_in_current_regime=1) after prior 7/7 unanimous Choppy stability
Weekly intelligence slope steepened to -0.00715 from ~-0.002233 prior, accelerating negative momentum
avg_ret20=-2.23 and above_ema50=false confirm broad downside pressure
Recent 7d distribution introduces a Bear day (1 Bear / 6 Choppy) vs prior 7/7 Choppy — first regime break in the window
risks: Detection may be one-week wobble misclassified as transition
Trader manual confirmation required; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational alert; no system mutation. Auto-suppresses on next run if regime stabilizes.

transition_evidence: Current regime classification flipped to Bear (days_in_current_regime=1) after prior 7/7 unanimous Choppy stability
Weekly intelligence slope steepened to -0.00715 from ~-0.002233 prior, accelerating negative momentum
avg_ret20=-2.23 and above_ema50=false confirm broad downside pressure
Recent 7d distribution introduces a Bear day (1 Bear / 6 Choppy) vs prior 7/7 Choppy — first regime break in the window
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Current regime flipped to Bear with days_in_current_regime=1 after a prior 7/7 Choppy stable distribution, and the weekly intelligence slope has steepened sharply negative (-0.00715 vs ~-0.002 prior) with avg_ret20 at -2.23 and price below EMA50. The recent 7d distribution is now Choppy-majority but includes a fresh Bear day breaking the prior unanimous stability, signaling a genuine inflection from the prolonged Choppy regime.
